name: Coda
description: Coda is a document collaboration platform that combines spreadsheets, docs, and automation. Use this API to manage documents, tables, rows, columns, formulas, controls, pages, and automations programmatically.

capabilities.name: docs_list
capabilities.description: List all documents accessible to the authenticated user with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: docs_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific document.

capabilities.name: docs_create
capabilities.description: Create a new Coda document, optionally from a template.

capabilities.name: docs_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a document by its ID.

capabilities.name: pages_list
capabilities.description: List all pages within a document.

capabilities.name: pages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific page by ID.

capabilities.name: pages_update
capabilities.description: Update a page's name, subtitle, or icon.

capabilities.name: tables_list
capabilities.description: List all tables in a document.

capabilities.name: tables_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific table.

capabilities.name: columns_list
capabilities.description: List all columns in a table.

capabilities.name: columns_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific column by ID.

capabilities.name: rows_list
capabilities.description: List rows from a table with optional filtering, sorting, and pagination.

capabilities.name: rows_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific row by ID.

capabilities.name: rows_upsert
capabilities.description: Insert or update rows in a table. Rows matching keyColumns are updated; others are inserted.

capabilities.name: rows_update
capabilities.description: Update a specific row's cell values.

capabilities.name: rows_delete
capabilities.description: Delete specified rows from a table.

capabilities.name: formulas_list
capabilities.description: List all named formulas in a document.

capabilities.name: formulas_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific formula and its current value.

capabilities.name: controls_list
capabilities.description: List all controls (buttons, sliders, etc.) in a document.

capabilities.name: controls_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific control and its current value.

capabilities.name: automations_list
capabilities.description: List all automations in a document.

capabilities.name: automations_trigger
capabilities.description: Trigger an automation rule to run immediately.

capabilities.name: resolve_browser_link
capabilities.description: Resolve a Coda browser URL to API resource metadata.

capabilities.name: whoami
capabilities.description: Retrieve information about the authenticated API token owner.

capabilities.name: mutation_status
capabilities.description: Check the status of an asynchronous mutation (row insert/update/delete).
